classes.name: wages_base_pay
classes.description: Base wage rates, salary schedules, step increases, and classifications tied to pay.

classes.name: wages_premiums
classes.description: Shift differential, weekend premium, hazard pay, lead pay, and similar premiums.

classes.name: overtime
classes.description: Overtime eligibility, overtime rates, call-in guarantees, and distribution rules.

classes.name: hours_and_scheduling
classes.description: Regular hours, shifts, posting of schedules, rotations, and changes to tours.

classes.name: paid_leave
classes.description: Vacation, sick leave, personal days, holidays, and paid time off accrual and usage.

classes.name: family_medical_leave
classes.description: Family or medical leave rights, eligibility, reinstatement, and related benefits continuation.

classes.name: health_insurance
classes.description: Medical, dental, vision, and prescription coverage including employee contributions.

classes.name: retirement_pension
classes.description: Pension, annuity, retirement savings, and employer contribution obligations.

classes.name: job_security_layoff_recall
classes.description: Layoff order, bumping rights, recall procedures, and workforce reduction protections.

classes.name: seniority
classes.description: Definition and application of seniority for promotions, layoffs, recalls, and scheduling.

classes.name: discipline_and_discharge
classes.description: Just-cause standards, progressive discipline, investigations, and termination procedures.

classes.name: grievance_and_arbitration
classes.description: Grievance steps, timelines, arbitration rights, and remedies.

classes.name: union_security_and_dues
classes.description: Dues deduction, agency fee language, membership requirements, and related administration.

classes.name: management_rights
classes.description: Reserved management authority, operational discretion, and limits on bargaining obligations.
